mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS id, DATE_FORMAT(t.queued_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, t.user_id AS userId, t.client_message_id AS clientMessageId, COALESCE(t.trace_id, '') AS traceId, COALESCE(t.channel, UPPER(t.request_type)) AS channel, COALESCE(t.model, '') AS model, t.status AS status, c.character_id AS characterId, t.conversation_id AS conversationId, COALESCE(t.duration_ms, 0) AS durationMs, CASE WHEN t.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS success, COALESCE( t.http_status, CASE WHEN t.status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 200 WHEN t.status = 'STOPPED' THEN 499 ELSE 500 END ) AS httpStatus, COALESCE(t.prompt_tokens, 0) AS promptTokens, COALESCE(t.completion_tokens, 0) AS completionTokens, COALESCE(t.error_code, '') AS errorCode, COALESCE(t.error_message, t.error_code, '') AS errorMessage FROM app_generation_task t LEFT JOIN app_conversation c ON c.id = t.conversation_id
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_generation_stat_event ( task_id, source_type, source_id, event_day, status, channel, model, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT t.id, 'TASK', t.id, DATE(COALESCE(t.queued_at, t.started_at, t.finished_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)), COALESCE(NULLIF(t.status, ''), 'QUEUED'), t.channel, t.model, COALESCE(t.queued_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM app_generation_task t WHERE t.queued_at < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL #{beforeDays} DAY) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE event_day = VALUES(event_day), status = VALUES(status), channel = COALESCE(VALUES(channel), app_generation_stat_event.channel), model = COALESCE(VALUES(model), app_generation_stat_event.model), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM app_generation_task WHERE queued_at < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL #{beforeDays} DAY)
